summary: Regression-risk review passes: final c279e4c test-only delta narrows explicit preview review-prepare summary output and does not weaken workflow replay gating.

inspection.summary: Inspected review request, story/spec/architecture docs, full story diff, final delta 0cd3088..HEAD, implementation call sites in src/pr-manager.js, src/agent-review.js, src/flow-verifier.js, persisted PR/gate artifacts, and focused regression tests for workflow replay, preview role summary, zero-probe flow verification, and Basic Auth redaction.
inspection.evidence: Subagent 019ee55f-c334-7512-b6bb-41706975c627 PASS JSON; focused tests cited by subagent: risk-adaptive gate 13/13, workflow PR prepare E2E 1/1, review prepare explicit role 1/1, zero-probe and Basic Auth redaction 2/2.

judgment_delta: Initial concern: c279e4c test-only delta might hide preview review-summary regression -> final judgment: assertion matches resolveStageSummaryRoles explicit-role contract, while PR-final required reviews still exclude preview_smoke and retain network_runtime/human_usability.

Initial concern: E2E record replay could accept fake evidence -> final judgment: current logic requires structured flow_replay and scenario_clause_e2e observations, existing E2E spec target, and command containing the full target path; tests reject marker-only, missing-target, non-e2e, route-target, manifest-only, stale, zero-probe, and basename-only cases.
